bank.retain_mission: Extract product strategy decisions, prioritization rationale, user research synthesis, behavioral experiments, sprint outcomes, and trend signals that shape the roadmap.
bank.observations_mission: Observations are stable facts about the product's users, jobs-to-be-done, north-star metric, prioritization framework, and recurring sources of customer feedback. Ignore one-off feature requests and ephemeral roadmap shuffles.

mental_models.name: Product Strategy
mental_models.source_query: What is the product strategy? Target users, jobs-to-be-done, north-star metric, key bets, and the prioritization framework in use.

mental_models.name: User Signal
mental_models.source_query: What are users telling us through research, support, and behavior? Include synthesized themes, validated hypotheses, and trend signals worth tracking.
